label: Fixed-Point Convert
description: Convert float array to fixed-point using fxpmath. Outputs Fxp object, quantized float, integer representation, and bit-width metadata for downstream HDL modules.

parameters.label: Code
parameters.default:
from fxpmath import Fxp
import numpy as np

# Convert float signal to fixed-point
_input = ${input_var}
${output_var} = Fxp(_input, signed=${signed}, n_word=${n_word}, n_frac=${n_frac})
${output_var}_float = ${output_var}.astype(float)  # quantized back to float

# Integer representation for HDL (Amaranth Signal values)
${output_var}_int = ${output_var}.val.astype(int)

# Bit-width metadata for downstream modules
${output_var}_n_word = int(${n_word})
${output_var}_n_frac = int(${n_frac})
${output_var}_signed = ${signed}

# Report quantization stats
_err = np.array(_input, dtype=float) - ${output_var}_float
print(f'Fixed-point: Q{int(${n_word})-int(${n_frac})}.{${n_frac}} ({"signed" if ${signed} else "unsigned"})')
print(f'Word: {${n_word}} bits, Frac: {${n_frac}} bits')
print(f'Range: [{${output_var}.lower}, {${output_var}.upper}]')
print(f'Resolution: {${output_var}.precision}')
print(f'Max quantization error: {np.max(np.abs(_err)):.6e}')
print(f'Integer values: {${output_var}_int[:8].tolist()}...' if len(${output_var}_int) > 8 else f'Integer values: {${output_var}_int.tolist()}')
